ceb.c. 915 - 920–: gikan sa mga 0915 hangtod sa 0920–Patay na

zh.lifeSummary: Carwed "Kerwit" ab Marchudd, Lord of Brynffenigl是Marchudd ap Cynan, Lord of Brynffenigl的兒子，於從大約0915年到0920年出生。他至少有1個兒子。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Carwed "Kerwit" ab Marchudd, Lord of Brynffenigl是Marchudd ap Cynan, Lord of Brynffenigl的儿子，于从大约0915年到0920年出生。他至少有1个儿子。

nameMeanings.name: ab
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Long, Minh, Muoi, Phan, Phat, Vinh, Cuong, Hien, Hoa, Lam, Lan.  Chinese Wing, Chi, Kin, Cheuk, Chi Wai, Chuen, Hon, Keung, Wah, Wai, Chiu, Ho.
Chinese: alternative Mandarin form of the surname 敖, see   Ao  .
Chinese: Cantonese form of the surnames 歐 and 區, see   Ou   1 and 2.

variants.name: Auerbach
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Hyman, Moshe, Emanuel, Isidor, Bronia, Chaim, Faigy, Menachem, Meyer, Yechezkel.
German: habitational name from any of several places in southern Germany and Austria called Auerbach ‘the stream at the water meadow’. See also 2,   Au  , and   Bach  .
Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from the town of Auerbach in the Upper Palatinate, Bavaria. Compare   Averbach  .

variants.name: Ao
meanings: Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 敖, meaning both ‘rambling’ and ‘deposed king without posthumous titles’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from the personal name of Tai Ao (太敖), teacher of the legendary king Zhuanxu (traditional dates: 2514–2437 BC ). (ii) it is said that the surname is also borne by descendants of deposed kings of the former state of Chu, with no posthumous titles, during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476 BC ).

variants.name: Auer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Alois, Hans, Erwin, Matthias, Siegfried, Bernd, Bernhard, Erna, Franz, Fritz, Hermann, Horst.

German (mainly Bavaria): topographic name for someone living by a water meadow, German Au, or a habitational name for someone from a place called Au or Aue (see Au and Aue ). This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine), Czechia, and Slovenia.

nameMeanings.name: Lord
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English laford, louerd, lord ‘lord, master’ (Old English hlāford), perhaps given to a someone who played the part of the lord or master of ceremonies in festival games.
Irish: adoption of the English name (see 1 above) as a translation of the main element of Gaelic Ó Tighearnaigh (see Tierney ) and Mac Thighearnáin (see McKiernan ).
Americanized form of French Laure, a variant of the personal name Laur 3.

variants.name: Tierney
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Eamon, John Patrick, Brigid, Clodagh, Kieran, Michael Sean, Siobhan.

Irish: shortened form of O'Tierney, an Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Tíghearnaigh ‘descendant of Tighearnach’, a byname meaning ‘lord, master’. The Gaelic name is sometimes ‘translated’ as English Lord . Compare Tiernan .

variants.name: Lords
meanings: English: variant of Lord , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Korean Kyong, Kyong Suk, Young, Chae, Chi Young, Hang, Kil, Rin, Sang Hun, Chang, Chong, Insoo, Kum, Sun Young, Yom, Young Hwan.  Cambodian Kiwan, Oeurn, Phoeun, Pich, Saroeuth, Seung, Sophath, Sophea, Yoeun, Phan, Son.  Indian Shanti, Harendra.
Indian (Uttar Pradesh): Brahmin name, from Sanskrit om, the Hindu sacred and mystic syllable uttered at the beginning of prayers.
Cambodian: written ឱម, corresponding to the exclamation of solemn affirmation, of Sanskrit origin (see 1 above), chanted by Buddhist monks.

variants.name: Oum
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Southeast Asian Heang, Hye, Kam, Kan, Kheng, Khin, Kun, Sang, Sok, Phong, Yom, Yoo, Youn, Cuong, Phal, Samnang, Tin.  Cambodian Sokha, Chheang, Choeun, Moeun, Roeun, Sambath, Samoeun, Savuth, Soeun, Sopheap.
Cambodian: written អ៊ុំ, from a Khmer word denoting an elder sibling of one's parent (i.e. ‘uncle’ or ‘aunt’). Compare   Om   3 and   Um   2.

nameMeanings.name: "Kerwit"
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Mainly U.S.: of Irish and Manx origin, from the Gaelic surname form Mac Dhiarmaid ‘son of Diarmaid’ ( see Dermot ). The name was borne by a son of the American president Theodore Roosevelt , and by a frog puppet, created in the 1970s for Jim Henson's Muppet Show.

en.lifeSummary: Carwed "Kerwit" ab Marchudd, Lord of Brynffenigl was born from about 0915 to 0920 as the son of Marchudd ap Cynan, Lord of Brynffenigl. He had at least 1 son.

fr.lifeSummary: Carwed "Kerwit" ab Marchudd, Lord of Brynffenigl est né du environ 0915 au 0920, fils de Marchudd ap Cynan, Lord of Brynffenigl. Il a eu au moins 1 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Carwed "Kerwit" ab Marchudd, Lord of Brynffenigl wurde von um 0915 bis 0920, als Sohn von Marchudd ap Cynan, Lord of Brynffenigl geboren. Er hatte mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Carwed "Kerwit" ab Marchudd, Lord of Brynffenigl è nato il da circa 0915 a 0920 come figlio di Marchudd ap Cynan, Lord of Brynffenigl. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio.

ja.lifeSummary: Carwed "Kerwit" ab Marchudd, Lord of Brynffeniglはから約0915年まで0920年にMarchudd ap Cynan, Lord of Brynffeniglの息子として生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Carwed "Kerwit" ab Marchudd, Lord of Brynffenigl(은)는 대략 0915년 부터 0920년 까지 Marchudd ap Cynan, Lord of Brynffenigl의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Carwed "Kerwit" ab Marchudd, Lord of Brynffenigl nasceu de aproximadamente 0915 a 0920 filho de Marchudd ap Cynan, Lord of Brynffenigl. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho.

ru.lifeSummary: Carwed "Kerwit" ab Marchudd, Lord of Brynffenigl родился с около 0915 по 0920. Его отца звали Marchudd ap Cynan, Lord of Brynffenigl. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын.

sm.c. 915 - 920–: mai le e tusa o le 0915 e o'o I le 0920–Ua Maliu
sm.c. 915 - 920: mai le e tusa o le 0915 e o'o I le 0920

es.lifeSummary: Carwed "Kerwit" ab Marchudd, Lord of Brynffenigl nació desde aproximadamente 0915 hasta 0920 como hijo de Marchudd ap Cynan, Lord of Brynffenigl. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo.
